title: Critical Priority Escalation
sop: Page the on-call owner immediately via the incident management system, open an incident ticket referencing the entity_id, and do not close the incident until integrity_status returns to PASS on a subsequent run.

title: High Priority Review
sop: Assign to the owning team's queue for review within the current business day; no page required unless priority escalates to CRITICAL on a subsequent evaluation.

title: Medium Priority Monitoring
sop: Add to the team's routine review backlog; re-evaluate at the next scheduled operational review rather than acting immediately.

title: Low Priority Logging
sop: Log for trend analysis only; no individual action required unless the same entity recurs across multiple consecutive evaluation cycles.
